# Pull Request

## Scope

- [ ] Static site/docs only
- [ ] No server/runtime code
- [ ] No Android code
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, keys, credentials, or private host paths
- [ ] No payment integration or payment configuration
- [ ] No deployment configuration
- [ ] No live account, payment, ownership, or auction claims
- [ ] No private roadmap, anti-cheat internals, receipt authority, or verifier internals

## Preview Boundary

- [ ] Any account, shop, or housing interaction remains preview-only unless backed by a named production proof path
- [ ] Public copy does not imply live-service readiness
- [ ] Public copy does not grant source-use rights beyond `LICENSE`
- [ ] Public copy does not describe this repository as carrying public reuse rights unless the license has changed

## Validation

- [ ] Private-path/secret scan reviewed
- [ ] Claim-risk scan reviewed
- [ ] Static preview checked locally, if site files changed

## Notes

Unsolicited pull requests may be closed without review unless requested or
pre-authorized by Akalynth maintainers.
